hooks.command: bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -n "$root" ] || root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || exit 0; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && root="$(cygpath -u "$root")"; bash "$root/.agents/tools/hooks/trunk_edit_guard.sh"'

bash -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -n "$root" ] || root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || exit 0; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && root="$(cygpath -u "$root")"; bash "$root/.agents/tools/hooks/authority_doc_budget.sh"'
